summary: Tested Feature 1 (Status Report PPT) and Feature 2 (Project Templates). All 16 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified. Found and fixed a critical permission bug: cp@altair.fr was assigned to PORTFOLIO profile which lacked 'export.status_report' permission in DB (profile was seeded before this permission was added). Fixed by adding the permission to the DB profile directly.

critical.issue: Existing profiles in DB were seeded before 'export.status_report' was added to DEFAULT_PROFILES. The seed function is idempotent (skips if >= 12 profiles exist) so new permissions are never applied to existing tenants. PORTFOLIO and CHEF_DE_PROJET profiles were missing 'export.status_report'. Fixed manually in DB but E1 needs to add a migration/re-seed mechanism.

action_items: E1: Fix seed_default_profiles() to update permissions of EXISTING profiles when DEFAULT_PROFILES changes (use upsert with permissions sync, not just count-based skip). Currently a new permission added to service.py DEFAULT_PROFILES won't propagate to existing DB profiles.
E1: Consider adding a migration endpoint or startup hook that syncs existing profiles' permissions against DEFAULT_PROFILES
critical_code_review_comments: seed_default_profiles() at /app/backend/modules/profiles/service.py:427 uses `if existing >= 12: return` guard — this means any new permission added to DEFAULT_PROFILES will never be applied to existing tenants. Should use upsert-by-code instead.
cp@altair.fr was assigned profile_id pointing to PORTFOLIO profile, not CHEF_DE_PROJET. Both profiles needed 'export.status_report' added.
updated_files: MongoDB: profiles collection (added export.status_report to PORTFOLIO and CHEF_DE_PROJET profiles)
seed_data_creation: None - only DB profile permissions updated to fix bug
context_for_next_testing_agent: Status Report and Project Templates both working. Weather endpoint returns 4 indicators (perimeter, budget, calendar, scope_change) each with valid level (soleil/nuage/pluie/orage/gel). PPT generation returns pptx > 10KB. Templates: 3 defaults (Waterfall 6 phases, Agile 5 phases, SAFe 4 phases). Template section appears in project creation modal. CP user now has export.status_report permission (fixed in DB). Admin templates page at /admin/templates shows 3 templates with phases.
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: seed_default_profiles() is idempotent based on count (>= 12 profiles = skip). When 'export.status_report' permission was added to DEFAULT_PROFILES in service.py, existing tenants' profiles in DB were never updated. Fix: added permission via $addToSet to both PORTFOLIO and CHEF_DE_PROJET profiles. Long-term fix needed in seed function to sync permissions per profile code.
